title: Postmark vs Mailgun (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Postmark vs Mailgun: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Postmark and Mailgun comes down to your specific use case. Postmark is built for developers who need fast, reliable transactional email, while Mailgun targets developers sending transactional and bulk email via API.

comparison_table.tool_a: Developers Who Need Fast, Reliable Transactional Email
comparison_table.tool_b: Developers Sending Transactional And Bulk Email Via Api

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on developers who need fast, reliable transactional email
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on developers sending transactional and bulk email via API

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Postmark wins for developers who need fast, reliable transactional email, while Mailgun is stronger for developers sending transactional and bulk email via API.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Postmark or Mailgun?
faq.a: Postmark starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Mailgun to Postmark?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
